clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Eligible applicants are unemployed Ulsan residents or recent graduates aged 19 to 39.

clauses.title: Required Documents
clauses.text: Applicants must submit resident registration, job-seeking or graduation proof, employment insurance history, and a bankbook copy.

clauses.title: Application Deadline
clauses.text: Applications close on April 15 each year and additional notice rounds may be opened.

clauses.title: Support Amount
clauses.text: Interview preparation support amount is up to 500000 KRW per person.
